      @@ -0,0 +1,194 @@
      1+
      import { Link } from "@tanstack/react-router";
      2+
      import { trpcMandatoryAuth } from "@vaatun/vantage-ui/routers";
      3+
      import { type ReactNode } from "react";
      4+
      5+
      export type CreditAdminTab = "wallets" | "ledger" | "config";
      6+
      export type SortDirection = "asc" | "desc";
      7+
      export type CreditType = "base" | "promotional";
      8+
      export type CreditTypeFilter = CreditType | "all";
      9+
      export type LedgerMetadata = Record<string, unknown>;
      10+
      11+
      export type CreditConfigResult = {
      12+
      tenantId: string;
      13+
      tenantName: string;
      14+
      tenantHost: string;
      15+
      defaultHost: string;
      16+
      environment: string;
      17+
      hostnames: string[];
      18+
      creditConfig: unknown | null;
      19+
      };
      20+
      21+
      type CreditAdminShellProps = {
      22+
      activeTab: CreditAdminTab;
      23+
      currentOrigin: string;
      24+
      isTenantContextLoading: boolean;
      25+
      tenantContext: CreditConfigResult | null;
      26+
      tenantContextError?: string;
      27+
      children: ReactNode;
      28+
      };
      29+
      30+
      type CreditAdminTenantContext = {
      31+
      currentOrigin: string;
      32+
      tenantContext: CreditConfigResult | null;
      33+
      isTenantContextLoading: boolean;
      34+
      tenantContextError?: string;
      35+
      };
      36+
      37+
      const tabs = [
      38+
      {
      39+
      id: "wallets" as const,
      40+
      label: "Wallets",
      41+
      href: "/dev-tools/credit-admin/wallets" as const
      42+
      },
      43+
      {
      44+
      id: "ledger" as const,
      45+
      label: "Ledger",
      46+
      href: "/dev-tools/credit-admin/ledger" as const
      47+
      },
      48+
      {
      49+
      id: "config" as const,
      50+
      label: "Credit Config",
      51+
      href: "/dev-tools/credit-admin/config" as const
      52+
      }
      53+
      ];
      54+
      55+
      export const useCreditAdminTenantContext = (): CreditAdminTenantContext => {
      56+
      const tenantContextQuery =
      57+
      trpcMandatoryAuth["dev-tools"]["credit.config.get"].useQuery();
      58+
      const tenantContext =
      59+
      (tenantContextQuery.data as CreditConfigResult | undefined) ?? null;
      60+
      const currentOrigin =
      61+
      typeof window === "undefined" ? "" : window.location.origin;
      62+
      1
      63+
      return {
      64+
      currentOrigin,
      65+
      tenantContext,
      66+
      isTenantContextLoading: tenantContextQuery.isLoading,
      67+
      tenantContextError: tenantContextQuery.error?.message
      68+
      };
      69+
      };
      70+
      71+
      export const formatDateTime = (value?: string | null): string => {
      72+
      if (!value) return "-";
      73+
      return new Date(value).toLocaleString("en-IN", {
      74+
      day: "2-digit",
      75+
      month: "short",
      76+
      year: "numeric",
      77+
      hour: "2-digit",
      78+
      minute: "2-digit"
      79+
      });
      80+
      };
      81+
      82+
      export const readStatusFromMetadata = (
      83+
      metadata: LedgerMetadata | null
      84+
      ): string => {
      85+
      if (metadata && typeof metadata.status === "string") {
      86+
      return metadata.status;
      87+
      }
      88+
      return "unknown";
      89+
      };
      90+
      91+
      export const readFeatureFromMetadata = (
      92+
      metadata: LedgerMetadata | null
      93+
      ): string => {
      94+
      if (metadata && typeof metadata.feature === "string") {
      95+
      return metadata.feature;
      96+
      }
      97+
      return "n/a";
      98+
      };
      99+
      100+
      export const JsonBlock = ({
      101+
      data,
      102+
      title
      103+
      }: {
      104+
      data: unknown;
      105+
      title?: string;
      106+
      }) => (
      107+
      <div className="w-full min-w-0">
      108+
      {title ? (
      109+
      <h3 className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 mb-2">{title}</h3>
      110+
      ) : null}
      111+
      <div className="w-full min-w-0 max-h-[65vh] overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden rounded-md border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800">
      112+
      <pre className="w-full min-w-0 whitespace-pre-wrap break-words p-3 text-[11px] leading-5 [overflow-wrap:anywhere] bg-gray-50 dark:bg-gray-800">
      113+
      {JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)}
      114+
      </pre>
      115+
      </div>
      116+
      </div>
      117+
      );
      118+
      119+
      export const CreditAdminShell = ({
      120+
      activeTab,
      121+
      currentOrigin,
      122+
      isTenantContextLoading,
      123+
      tenantContext,
      124+
      tenantContextError,
      125+
      children
      126+
      }: CreditAdminShellProps) => (
      127+
      <div className="p-6 max-w-7xl mx-auto space-y-8 text-sm text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">
      128+
      <div>
      129+
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Credit Admin</h1>
      130+
      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
      131+
      Manage wallets and inspect ledger activity for the tenant resolved by
      132+
      the current app URL.
      133+
      </p>
      134+
      </div>
      135+
      136+
      <section className="border rounded-lg p-4 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900">
      137+
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
      138+
      <div className="flex gap-2">
      139+
      {tabs.map((tab) => (
      140+
      <Link
      141+
      key={tab.id}
      142+
      to={tab.href}
      143+
      search={{}}
      144+
      className={`px-3 py-2 rounded-md text-sm ${
      145+
      activeTab === tab.id
      146+
      ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary border border-primary/40 dark:bg-primary/20 dark:text-primary-foreground dark:border-primary/50"
      147+
      : "border border-gray-200 bg-white text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700 dark:bg-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 dark:hover:bg-gray-700"
      148+
      }`}
      149+
      >
      150+
      {tab.label}
      151+
      </Link>
      152+
      ))}
      153+
      </div>
      154+
      </div>
      155+
      </section>
      156+
      157+
      <section className="border rounded-lg p-4 space-y-3 bg-white dark:bg-gray-900">
      158+
      <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Tenant Context</h2>
      159+
      {isTenantContextLoading ? (
      160+
      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">
      161+
      Resolving current tenant...
      162+
      </p>
      163+
      ) : tenantContextError ? (
      164+
      <p className="text-sm text-red-600 dark:text-red-400">
      165+
      {tenantContextError}
      166+
      </p>
      167+
      ) : (
      168+
      <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2 text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">
      169+
      <div className="space-y-1">
      170+
      <p>Resolved tenant ID: {tenantContext?.tenantId ?? "-"}</p>
      171+
      <p>
      172+
      Tenant:{" "}
      173+
      <span className="font-medium text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-100">
      174+
      {tenantContext?.tenantName ?? "-"}
      1
      175+
      </span>
      176+
      </p>
      177+
      <p>Resolved host: {tenantContext?.tenantHost ?? "-"}</p>
      178+
      <p>Default host: {tenantContext?.defaultHost ?? "-"}</p>
      179+
      </div>
      180+
      <div className="space-y-1">
      181+
      <p>Current app origin: {currentOrigin || "-"}</p>
      182+
      <p>Available hosts: {tenantContext?.hostnames.join(", ") || "-"}</p>
      183+
      <p>Environment: {tenantContext?.environment ?? "-"}</p>
      184+
      <p>
      185+
      This page is locked to the tenant resolved by the current URL.
      186+
      </p>
      187+
      </div>
      188+
      </div>
      189+
      )}
      190+
      </section>
      191+
      192+
      {children}
      193+
      </div>
      194+
      );

      export const Route = createFileRoute("/dev-tools/_layout")({

      69

      710

      811
      function DevToolsLayout() {
      12+
      const isDev = isLocalhost();
      13+
      const { data: currentUser, isLoading } = trpcMandatoryAuth["user-management"][
      14+
      "currentUser.get"
      15+
      ].useQuery(undefined, {
      16+
      enabled: isDev
      17+
      });
      18+
      19+
      if (!isDev) {
      20+
      return (
      21+
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-6">
      22+
      <div className="max-w-2xl rounded-lg border border-amber-300 dark:border-amber-500/50 bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-950/40 p-6">
      23+
      <h1 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2 text-amber-900 dark:text-amber-200">
      24+
      Dev Tools Unavailable
      25+
      </h1>
      26+
      <p className="text-sm text-amber-800 dark:text-amber-300">
      27+
      Dev tools are only accessible in local development environment.
      28+
      </p>
      29+
      </div>
      30+
      </div>
      31+
      );
      32+
      }
      33+
      34+
      if (isLoading) {
      35+
      return (
      36+
      <div className="p-6 text-sm text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400">
      37+
      Loading authorization...
      38+
      </div>
      39+
      );
      40+
      }
      41+
      42+
      const roles = currentUser?.user?.partner?.roles ?? [];
      43+
      const isAdmin = roles.includes("TENANT_MANAGER");
      44+
      if (!isAdmin) {
      45+
      return (
      46+
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center p-6">
      47+
      <div className="max-w-2xl rounded-lg border border-destructive/40 bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/40 p-6">
      48+
      <h1 className="text-xl font-bold mb-2 text-destructive">
      49+
      Access denied
      50+
      </h1>
      51+
      <p className="text-sm text-destructive/90 dark:text-red-300">
      52+
      This section is restricted to Tenant Managers only.
      53+
      </p>
      54+
      </div>
      55+
      </div>
      56+
      );
      57+
      }
      58+
      1
      959
      return (
      1060
      <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
      1161
      <header className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800">
      @@ -16,6 +66,8 @@

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +43Lines changed: 43 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
      1+
      -- CreateTable
      2+
      CREATE TABLE "Wallet" (
      3+
      "id" TEXT NOT NULL,
      4+
      "creditType" TEXT NOT NULL,
      5+
      "scope" TEXT,
      6+
      "remainingAmount" DECIMAL(65,30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      7+
      "expiryDate" TIMESTAMP(3),
      8+
      "createdAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
      9+
      "updatedAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,
      10+
      11+
      CONSTRAINT "Wallet_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
      12+
      );
      13+
      14+
      -- CreateTable
      15+
      CREATE TABLE "CreditLedger" (
      16+
      "id" TEXT NOT NULL,
      17+
      "walletId" TEXT,
      18+
      "operationId" TEXT,
      19+
      "creditType" TEXT NOT NULL,
      20+
      "amount" DECIMAL(65,30) NOT NULL,
      21+
      "metadata" JSONB NOT NULL,
      22+
      "createdAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
      23+
      24+
      CONSTRAINT "CreditLedger_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id")
      25+
      );
      26+
      27+
      -- CreateIndex
      28+
      CREATE INDEX "Wallet_creditType_scope_expiryDate_idx" ON "Wallet"("creditType", "scope", "expiryDate");
      29+
      30+
      -- CreateIndex
      31+
      CREATE INDEX "CreditLedger_operationId_idx" ON "CreditLedger"("operationId");
      32+
      33+
      -- CreateIndex
      34+
      CREATE INDEX "CreditLedger_walletId_idx" ON "CreditLedger"("walletId");
      35+
      36+
      -- CreateIndex
      37+
      CREATE INDEX "CreditLedger_creditType_idx" ON "CreditLedger"("creditType");
      38+
      39+
      -- CreateIndex
      40+
      CREATE INDEX "CreditLedger_createdAt_idx" ON "CreditLedger"("createdAt");
      41+
      42+
      -- AddForeignKey
      43+
      ALTER TABLE "CreditLedger" ADD CONSTRAINT "CreditLedger_walletId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("walletId") REFERENCES "Wallet"("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/calculator/adapters/draft-enrichment.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +53Lines changed: 53 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,53 @@
      1+
      import type {
      2+
      DraftEnrichmentUsageMetadata,
      3+
      ICreditCalculator,
      4+
      PricingValue
      5+
      } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      6+
      import { z } from "zod";
      7+
      8+
      const PageRangeValueSchema = z.object({
      9+
      tiers: z
      10+
      .array(
      11+
      z.object({
      12+
      maxPages: z.number().positive(),
      13+
      cost: z.number().nonnegative()
      14+
      })
      15+
      )
      16+
      .min(1),
      17+
      defaultCost: z.number().nonnegative()
      18+
      });
      19+
      20+
      export class DraftEnrichmentCalculator
      21+
      implements ICreditCalculator<"ai-draft-enrichment">
      22+
      {
      23+
      private readonly parsedValue: z.infer<typeof PageRangeValueSchema>;
      24+
      private readonly costMultiplier: number;
      25+
      private readonly partialCost: number;
      26+
      27+
      private roundMoney(value: number): number {
      28+
      return Number(value.toFixed(2));
      29+
      }
      30+
      31+
      constructor(pricingValue: PricingValue, costMultiplier: number) {
      32+
      this.parsedValue = PageRangeValueSchema.parse(pricingValue.value);
      33+
      this.costMultiplier = costMultiplier;
      34+
      this.partialCost = pricingValue.partialCost;
      35+
      }
      36+
      37+
      calculateCompleteCreditCost(usage: DraftEnrichmentUsageMetadata): number {
      38+
      const sorted = [...this.parsedValue.tiers].sort(
      39+
      (a, b) => a.maxPages - b.maxPages
      40+
      );
      41+
      const processedPages = usage.pdfMetadata?.processedPages;
      42+
      const matchedTier =
      43+
      processedPages == null
      44+
      ? undefined
      45+
      : sorted.find((t) => processedPages <= t.maxPages);
      46+
      const baseCost = matchedTier?.cost ?? this.parsedValue.defaultCost;
      47+
      return this.roundMoney(baseCost * this.costMultiplier);
      48+
      }
      49+
      50+
      calculatePartialCreditCost(_usage: DraftEnrichmentUsageMetadata): number {
      51+
      return this.roundMoney(this.partialCost * this.costMultiplier);
      52+
      }
      53+
      }
      Expand file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/calculator/adapters/index.ts‎

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/calculator/adapters/policy-entry.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +71Lines changed: 71 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
      1+
      import type {
      2+
      ICreditCalculator,
      3+
      PolicyEntryUsageMetadata,
      4+
      PricingValue
      5+
      } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      6+
      import { z } from "zod";
      7+
      8+
      const PageRangeValueSchema = z.object({
      9+
      tiers: z
      10+
      .array(
      11+
      z.object({
      12+
      maxPages: z.number().positive(),
      13+
      cost: z.number().nonnegative()
      14+
      })
      15+
      )
      16+
      .min(1),
      17+
      defaultCost: z.number().nonnegative()
      18+
      });
      19+
      20+
      export class PolicyEntryCalculator
      21+
      implements ICreditCalculator<"ai-policy-entry">
      22+
      {
      23+
      private readonly parsedValue: z.infer<typeof PageRangeValueSchema>;
      24+
      private readonly costMultiplier: number;
      25+
      private readonly partialCost: number;
      26+
      27+
      private roundMoney(value: number): number {
      28+
      return Number(value.toFixed(2));
      29+
      }
      30+
      31+
      constructor(pricingValue: PricingValue, costMultiplier: number) {
      32+
      this.parsedValue = PageRangeValueSchema.parse(pricingValue.value);
      33+
      this.costMultiplier = costMultiplier;
      34+
      this.partialCost = pricingValue.partialCost;
      35+
      }
      36+
      37+
      calculateCompleteCreditCost(usage: PolicyEntryUsageMetadata): number {
      38+
      const sorted = [...this.parsedValue.tiers].sort(
      39+
      (a, b) => a.maxPages - b.maxPages
      40+
      );
      41+
      const processedPages = usage.pdfMetadata?.processedPages;
      42+
      const matchedTier =
      43+
      processedPages == null
      44+
      ? undefined
      45+
      : sorted.find((t) => processedPages <= t.maxPages);
      46+
      const baseCost = matchedTier?.cost ?? this.parsedValue.defaultCost;
      47+
      console.info(
      48+
      "[PolicyEntryCalculator]",
      49+
      JSON.stringify({
      50+
      stage: "complete-cost",
      51+
      processedPages,
      52+
      matchedTier,
      53+
      baseCost,
      54+
      costMultiplier: this.costMultiplier
      55+
      })
      56+
      );
      57+
      return this.roundMoney(baseCost * this.costMultiplier);
      58+
      }
      59+
      60+
      calculatePartialCreditCost(_usage: PolicyEntryUsageMetadata): number {
      61+
      console.info(
      62+
      "[PolicyEntryCalculator]",
      63+
      JSON.stringify({
      64+
      stage: "partial-cost",
      65+
      partialCost: this.partialCost,
      66+
      costMultiplier: this.costMultiplier
      67+
      })
      68+
      );
      69+
      return this.roundMoney(this.partialCost * this.costMultiplier);
      70+
      }
      71+
      }
      Collapse file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/calculator/calculator-factory.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +34Lines changed: 34 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
      1+
      import type {
      2+
      FeatureName,
      3+
      ICreditCalculator,
      4+
      PricingValue
      5+
      } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      6+
      import { injectable } from "inversify";
      7+
      import { DraftEnrichmentCalculator } from "./adapters/draft-enrichment.ts";
      8+
      import { PolicyEntryCalculator } from "./adapters/policy-entry.ts";
      9+
      10+
      @injectable()
      11+
      export class CreditCalculatorFactory {
      12+
      create<F extends FeatureName>(
      13+
      feature: F,
      14+
      pricingValue: PricingValue,
      15+
      costMultiplier: number
      16+
      ): ICreditCalculator<F> {
      17+
      switch (feature) {
      18+
      case "ai-policy-entry":
      19+
      return new PolicyEntryCalculator(
      20+
      pricingValue,
      21+
      costMultiplier
      22+
      ) as ICreditCalculator<F>;
      23+
      case "ai-draft-enrichment":
      24+
      return new DraftEnrichmentCalculator(
      25+
      pricingValue,
      26+
      costMultiplier
      27+
      ) as ICreditCalculator<F>;
      28+
      default: {
      29+
      const _exhaustive: never = feature;
      30+
      throw new Error(`Unknown feature: ${feature}`);
      31+
      }
      32+
      }
      33+
      }
      34+
      }
      Expand file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/calculator/calculator.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +2Lines changed: 2 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/calculator/index.ts‎

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/repositories/ledger-repository.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +80Lines changed: 80 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
      1+
      import { Decimal } from "@prisma/client/runtime/client";
      2+
      import type { Prisma } from "@vaatun/backend-core-orm";
      3+
      import type { ICreditLedgerRepository } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      4+
      import { CreditSymbols } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      5+
      import { inject, injectable } from "inversify";
      6+
      import type { TransactionManager } from "../transaction-manager.ts";
      7+
      8+
      @injectable()
      9+
      export class CreditLedgerPrismaRepository implements ICreditLedgerRepository {
      10+
      @inject(CreditSymbols.TransactionManager)
      11+
      private transactionManager!: TransactionManager;
      12+
      13+
      async insertEntry(entry: {
      14+
      walletId: string | null;
      15+
      operationId: string;
      16+
      creditType: string;
      17+
      amount: Decimal;
      18+
      metadata: Record<string, unknown>;
      19+
      }) {
      20+
      const client = this.transactionManager.getClient();
      21+
      return await client.creditLedger.create({
      22+
      data: {
      23+
      ...entry,
      24+
      metadata: entry.metadata as Prisma.InputJsonValue
      25+
      }
      26+
      });
      27+
      }
      28+
      29+
      async getHistory(filters?: {
      30+
      operationId?: string;
      31+
      creditType?: string;
      32+
      from?: Date;
      33+
      to?: Date;
      34+
      }) {
      35+
      const client = this.transactionManager.getClient();
      36+
      return await client.creditLedger.findMany({
      37+
      where: {
      38+
      ...(filters?.operationId && { operationId: filters.operationId }),
      39+
      ...(filters?.creditType && { creditType: filters.creditType }),
      40+
      ...(filters?.from || filters?.to
      41+
      ? {
      42+
      createdAt: {
      43+
      ...(filters?.from && { gte: filters.from }),
      44+
      ...(filters?.to && { lte: filters.to })
      45+
      }
      46+
      }
      47+
      : {})
      48+
      },
      49+
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      50+
      include: { wallet: true }
      51+
      });
      52+
      }
      53+
      54+
      async getShortfallSummary(from: Date, to: Date) {
      55+
      const client = this.transactionManager.getClient();
      56+
      57+
      const entries = await client.creditLedger.findMany({
      58+
      where: {
      59+
      createdAt: { gte: from, lte: to },
      60+
      metadata: {
      61+
      path: ["status"],
      62+
      equals: "settled_with_shortfall"
      63+
      }
      64+
      },
      65+
      select: { metadata: true }
      66+
      });
      67+
      68+
      let totalShortfall = new Decimal(0);
      69+
      for (const entry of entries) {
      70+
      const meta = entry.metadata as Record<string, unknown>;
      71+
      if (meta.shortfallCredits) {
      72+
      totalShortfall = totalShortfall.add(
      73+
      new Decimal(meta.shortfallCredits as string)
      74+
      );
      75+
      }
      76+
      }
      77+
      78+
      return { count: entries.length, totalShortfall };
      79+
      }
      80+
      }
      Collapse file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/repositories/wallet-repository.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +91Lines changed: 91 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,91 @@
      1+
      import { Decimal } from "@prisma/client/runtime/client";
      2+
      import { DateObject } from "@vaatun/value-objects";
      3+
      import type {
      4+
      ICreditWalletRepository,
      5+
      WalletUpdate
      6+
      } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      7+
      import { CreditSymbols } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      8+
      import { inject, injectable } from "inversify";
      9+
      import type { TransactionManager } from "../transaction-manager.ts";
      10+
      11+
      @injectable()
      12+
      export class CreditWalletPrismaRepository implements ICreditWalletRepository {
      13+
      @inject(CreditSymbols.TransactionManager)
      14+
      private transactionManager!: TransactionManager;
      15+
      16+
      async getWalletsForFeature(feature: string) {
      17+
      const client = this.transactionManager.getClient();
      18+
      const activeFilter = {
      19+
      remainingAmount: { gt: new Decimal(0) },
      20+
      OR: [
      21+
      { expiryDate: null },
      22+
      { expiryDate: { gt: DateObject.today().toDate() } }
      23+
      ]
      24+
      };
      25+
      const orderBy = [
      26+
      { expiryDate: { sort: "asc" as const, nulls: "last" as const } }
      27+
      ];
      28+
      29+
      const [featureScopedWallets, mainWallets] = await Promise.all([
      30+
      client.wallet.findMany({
      31+
      where: { creditType: "promotional", scope: feature, ...activeFilter },
      32+
      orderBy
      33+
      }),
      34+
      client.wallet.findMany({
      35+
      where: { creditType: "base", scope: null, ...activeFilter },
      36+
      orderBy
      37+
      })
      38+
      ]);
      39+
      40+
      return { featureScopedWallets, mainWallets };
      41+
      }
      42+
      43+
      async executeWalletTransactions(updates: WalletUpdate[]) {
      44+
      const client = this.transactionManager.getClient();
      45+
      for (const update of updates) {
      46+
      await client.wallet.update({
      47+
      where: { id: update.walletId },
      48+
      data: { remainingAmount: { increment: update.amount } }
      49+
      // amount is negative for debits, so increment with negative = decrement
      50+
      });
      51+
      }
      52+
      }
      53+
      54+
      async createWallet(params: {
      55+
      creditType: "base" | "promotional";
      56+
      scope: string | null;
      57+
      remainingAmount: Decimal;
      58+
      expiryDate: Date | null;
      59+
      }) {
      60+
      const client = this.transactionManager.getClient();
      61+
      return await client.wallet.create({ data: params });
      62+
      }
      63+
      64+
      async getTotalBalance() {
      65+
      const client = this.transactionManager.getClient();
      66+
      const wallets = await client.wallet.findMany({
      67+
      where: {
      68+
      remainingAmount: { gt: new Decimal(0) },
      69+
      OR: [
      70+
      { expiryDate: null },
      71+
      { expiryDate: { gt: DateObject.today().toDate() } }
      72+
      ]
      73+
      }
      74+
      });
      75+
      76+
      let base = new Decimal(0);
      77+
      const promo: Record<string, Decimal> = {};
      78+
      79+
      for (const w of wallets) {
      80+
      if (w.creditType === "base") {
      81+
      base = base.add(w.remainingAmount);
      82+
      } else if (w.scope) {
      83+
      promo[w.scope] = (promo[w.scope] ?? new Decimal(0)).add(
      84+
      w.remainingAmount
      85+
      );
      86+
      }
      87+
      }
      88+
      89+
      return { base, promo };
      90+
      }
      91+
      }
      Expand file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/index.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +7Lines changed: 7 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Collapse file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/service-factory.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +85Lines changed: 85 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
      1+
      import {
      2+
      CreditSymbols,
      3+
      type FeatureName,
      4+
      type ICreditLedgerRepository,
      5+
      type ICreditTracker,
      6+
      type ICreditWalletRepository,
      7+
      type TenantCreditConfig
      8+
      } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      9+
      import { inject, injectable } from "inversify";
      10+
      import type { CreditCalculatorFactory } from "./calculator/calculator-factory.ts";
      11+
      import { CreditTrackingService } from "./service.ts";
      12+
      13+
      // Must match TransactionManager shape
      14+
      interface ITransactionManager {
      15+
      executeInTransaction<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T>;
      16+
      }
      17+
      18+
      @injectable()
      19+
      export class CreditTrackingServiceFactory {
      20+
      @inject(CreditSymbols.WalletRepository)
      21+
      private walletRepo!: ICreditWalletRepository;
      22+
      23+
      @inject(CreditSymbols.LedgerRepository)
      24+
      private ledgerRepo!: ICreditLedgerRepository;
      25+
      26+
      @inject(CreditSymbols.TransactionManager)
      27+
      private transactionManager!: ITransactionManager;
      28+
      29+
      @inject(CreditSymbols.CalculatorFactory)
      30+
      private calculatorFactory!: CreditCalculatorFactory;
      31+
      32+
      /**
      33+
      * Creates a feature-scoped credit tracker.
      34+
      *
      35+
      * When creditConfig is provided, returns a full CreditTrackingService
      36+
      * that does preCheck → execute → settle.
      37+
      *
      38+
      * When creditConfig is undefined or the feature is not configured for
      39+
      * the tenant, returns a pass-through tracker that just executes the
      40+
      * callback without any credit tracking.
      41+
      */
      42+
      create<F extends FeatureName>(
      43+
      feature: F,
      44+
      creditConfig?: TenantCreditConfig
      45+
      ): ICreditTracker<F> {
      46+
      if (!creditConfig) {
      47+
      return {
      48+
      async executeWithCreditTracking(_m, callback, _u, _c) {
      49+
      return await callback();
      50+
      }
      51+
      };
      52+
      }
      53+
      54+
      const featureConfig = creditConfig.features.find((f) => f.name === feature);
      55+
      if (!featureConfig) {
      56+
      return {
      57+
      async executeWithCreditTracking(_m, callback, _u, _c) {
      58+
      return await callback();
      59+
      }
      60+
      };
      61+
      }
      62+
      63+
      // Feature override costMultiplier supersedes baseCostMultiplier
      64+
      const costMultiplier =
      65+
      creditConfig.featureOverrides[feature]?.costMultiplier ??
      66+
      creditConfig.baseCostMultiplier;
      67+
      68+
      const calculator = this.calculatorFactory.create(
      69+
      feature,
      70+
      featureConfig.pricingData,
      71+
      costMultiplier
      72+
      );
      73+
      74+
      return new CreditTrackingService(
      75+
      feature,
      76+
      calculator,
      77+
      this.walletRepo,
      78+
      this.ledgerRepo,
      79+
      this.transactionManager,
      80+
      costMultiplier,
      81+
      featureConfig.pricingData.basis.type,
      82+
      featureConfig.pricingData
      83+
      );
      84+
      }
      85+
      }
      Collapse file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/service.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +353Lines changed: 353 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,353 @@
      1+
      import { Decimal } from "@vaatun/value-objects";
      2+
      import type {
      3+
      DeductionResult,
      4+
      ExecutionResult,
      5+
      FeatureName,
      6+
      ICreditCalculator,
      7+
      ICreditLedgerRepository,
      8+
      ICreditTracker,
      9+
      ICreditWalletRepository,
      10+
      LedgerMetadata,
      11+
      PricingValue,
      12+
      UsageMetadata,
      13+
      WalletUpdate
      14+
      } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      15+
      import { InsufficientCreditsError } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities";
      16+
      17+
      // Must match TransactionManager shape without importing infra
      18+
      interface ITransactionManager {
      19+
      executeInTransaction<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T>;
      20+
      }
      21+
      22+
      export class CreditTrackingService<F extends FeatureName>
      23+
      implements ICreditTracker<F>
      24+
      {
      25+
      private decimalToTwoDecimals(value: Decimal): string {
      26+
      return value.toFixed(2);
      27+
      }
      28+
      29+
      private roundMoney(value: number): number {
      30+
      return Number(value.toFixed(2));
      31+
      }
      32+
      33+
      private log(step: string, data: Record<string, unknown>) {
      34+
      console.info(
      35+
      "[CreditTracking]",
      36+
      JSON.stringify({ feature: this.feature, step, ...data })
      37+
      );
      38+
      }
      39+
      40+
      constructor(
      41+
      private readonly feature: F,
      42+
      private readonly calculator: ICreditCalculator<F>,
      43+
      private readonly walletRepo: ICreditWalletRepository,
      44+
      private readonly ledgerRepo: ICreditLedgerRepository,
      45+
      private readonly transactionManager: ITransactionManager,
      46+
      private readonly costMultiplier: number,
      47+
      private readonly pricingBasis: string,
      48+
      private readonly pricingSnapshot: PricingValue
      49+
      ) {}
      50+
      51+
      /**
      52+
      * Full lifecycle: preCheck → execute callback → settle.
      53+
      *
      54+
      * 1. Calculate MAX POSSIBLE cost from initialMetadata
      55+
      * 2. Check wallet balance (read-only, no lock)
      56+
      * 3. If insufficient → throw InsufficientCreditsError (caller returns 402)
      57+
      * 4. Execute callback (AI streaming happens here)
      58+
      * 5. Determine final cost from ExecutionResult (complete/partial/0)
      59+
      * 6. Settle inside short transaction (re-fetch wallets, deduct, write ledger)
      60+
      */
      61+
      async executeWithCreditTracking(
      62+
      initialMetadata: UsageMetadata<F>,
      63+
      callback: () => Promise<ExecutionResult<F>>,
      64+
      userId: string,
      65+
      context?: Record<string, unknown>
      66+
      ): Promise<ExecutionResult<F>> {
      67+
      const startedAt = Date.now();
      68+
      this.log("execute.start", {
      69+
      userId,
      70+
      context
      71+
      });
      72+
      // ── Step 1: Calculate max possible cost based on initial metadata from the feature function ──
      73+
      const maxCost = this.roundMoney(
      74+
      this.calculator.calculateCompleteCreditCost(initialMetadata)
      75+
      );
      76+
      this.log("cost.max-calculated", { maxCost });
      77+
      78+
      // ── Step 2: PreCheck (read-only, no lock) ──
      79+
      const preCheck = await this.preCheck(maxCost);
      80+
      this.log("precheck.complete", { maxCost, preCheck });
      81+
      82+
      if (!preCheck.canProceed) {
      83+
      throw new InsufficientCreditsError(this.feature, maxCost);
      84+
      }
      85+
      86+
      // ── Step 3: Execute callback (AI work) ──
      87+
      this.log("callback.start", {});
      88+
      const result = await callback();
      89+
      this.log("callback.complete", {
      90+
      success: result.success,
      91+
      completeExecution: result.executionData.completeExecution,
      92+
      executionData: result.executionData
      93+
      });
      94+
      95+
      // ── Step 4: Determine final cost ──
      96+
      let finalCost: number;
      97+
      if (!result.success) {
      98+
      finalCost = 0;
      99+
      } else if (result.executionData.completeExecution) {
      100+
      finalCost = this.roundMoney(
      101+
      this.calculator.calculateCompleteCreditCost(
      102+
      result.executionData.metadata
      103+
      )
      104+
      );
      105+
      } else {
      106+
      finalCost = this.roundMoney(
      107+
      this.calculator.calculatePartialCreditCost(
      108+
      result.executionData.metadata
      109+
      )
      110+
      );
      111+
      }
      112+
      this.log("cost.final-calculated", { finalCost });
      113+
      114+
      // ── Step 5: Settle (if cost > 0) ──
      115+
      if (finalCost > 0) {
      116+
      const settlementResult = await this.settle({
      117+
      cost: new Decimal(finalCost),
      118+
      creditType: preCheck.creditType,
      119+
      userId,
      120+
      metadata: result.executionData.metadata,
      121+
      executionResult: result,
      122+
      completeExecution: result.executionData.completeExecution,
      123+
      context
      124+
      });
      125+
      this.log("settlement.result", {
      126+
      operationId: settlementResult.operationId,
      127+
      requestedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      128+
      settlementResult.requestedCredits
      129+
      ),
      130+
      deductedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      131+
      settlementResult.deductedCredits
      132+
      ),
      133+
      shortfallCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      134+
      settlementResult.shortfallCredits
      135+
      ),
      136+
      status: settlementResult.status
      137+
      });
      138+
      139+
      // Structured log on shortfall
      140+
      if (settlementResult.status === "settled_with_shortfall") {
      141+
      console.warn(
      142+
      `[CreditTracking] Shortfall detected`,
      143+
      JSON.stringify({
      144+
      feature: this.feature,
      145+
      operationId: settlementResult.operationId,
      146+
      requested: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      147+
      settlementResult.requestedCredits
      148+
      ),
      149+
      deducted: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      150+
      settlementResult.deductedCredits
      151+
      ),
      152+
      shortfall: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      153+
      settlementResult.shortfallCredits
      154+
      )
      155+
      })
      156+
      );
      157+
      }
      158+
      }
      159+
      160+
      this.log("execute.done", { durationMs: Date.now() - startedAt });
      161+
      return result;
      162+
      }
      163+
      164+
      // ── Private: PreCheck ──
      165+
      166+
      private async preCheck(
      167+
      cost: number
      168+
      ): Promise<
      169+
      | { canProceed: true; creditType: "base" | "promotional" }
      170+
      | { canProceed: false; creditType: null }
      171+
      > {
      172+
      const { featureScopedWallets, mainWallets } =
      173+
      await this.walletRepo.getWalletsForFeature(this.feature);
      174+
      175+
      // Try promo (all-or-nothing)
      176+
      const promoTotal = featureScopedWallets.reduce(
      177+
      (sum, w) => sum.add(w.remainingAmount),
      178+
      new Decimal(0)
      179+
      );
      180+
      if (promoTotal.gte(cost)) {
      181+
      this.log("precheck.wallets", {
      182+
      mode: "promotional",
      183+
      wallets: featureScopedWallets.length,
      184+
      totalRemaining: promoTotal.toString(),
      185+
      cost
      186+
      });
      187+
      return { canProceed: true, creditType: "promotional" };
      188+
      }
      189+
      190+
      // Promo can't cover → ignore entirely, try base
      191+
      const baseTotal = mainWallets.reduce(
      192+
      (sum, w) => sum.add(w.remainingAmount),
      193+
      new Decimal(0)
      194+
      );
      195+
      if (baseTotal.gte(cost)) {
      196+
      this.log("precheck.wallets", {
      197+
      mode: "base",
      198+
      wallets: mainWallets.length,
      199+
      totalRemaining: baseTotal.toString(),
      200+
      cost
      201+
      });
      202+
      return { canProceed: true, creditType: "base" };
      203+
      }
      204+
      205+
      this.log("precheck.insufficient", {
      206+
      promoTotal: promoTotal.toString(),
      207+
      baseTotal: baseTotal.toString(),
      208+
      cost
      209+
      });
      210+
      return { canProceed: false, creditType: null };
      211+
      }
      212+
      213+
      // ── Private: Settlement ──
      214+
      215+
      private async settle(params: {
      216+
      cost: Decimal;
      217+
      creditType: "base" | "promotional";
      218+
      userId: string;
      219+
      metadata: UsageMetadata<F>;
      220+
      executionResult: ExecutionResult<F>;
      221+
      completeExecution: boolean;
      222+
      context?: Record<string, unknown>;
      223+
      }): Promise<DeductionResult> {
      224+
      this.log("settle.start", {
      225+
      userId: params.userId,
      226+
      creditType: params.creditType,
      227+
      requestedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(params.cost),
      228+
      completeExecution: params.completeExecution
      229+
      });
      230+
      const operationId = crypto.randomUUID();
      231+
      232+
      return await this.transactionManager.executeInTransaction(async () => {
      233+
      // ── Re-fetch wallets inside transaction (fresh balances) ──
      234+
      const { featureScopedWallets, mainWallets } =
      235+
      await this.walletRepo.getWalletsForFeature(this.feature);
      236+
      237+
      const wallets =
      238+
      params.creditType === "promotional"
      239+
      ? featureScopedWallets
      240+
      : mainWallets;
      241+
      242+
      // ── Compute waterfall deductions ──
      243+
      let remaining = params.cost;
      244+
      const walletUpdates: WalletUpdate[] = [];
      245+
      const walletsUsed: { walletId: string; amountDeducted: Decimal }[] = [];
      246+
      247+
      for (const wallet of wallets) {
      248+
      if (remaining.lte(0)) break;
      249+
      const deductAmount = Decimal.min(wallet.remainingAmount, remaining);
      250+
      if (deductAmount.lte(0)) continue;
      251+
      252+
      walletUpdates.push({
      253+
      walletId: wallet.id,
      254+
      amount: deductAmount.neg() // negative for debit
      255+
      });
      256+
      walletsUsed.push({
      257+
      walletId: wallet.id,
      258+
      amountDeducted: deductAmount
      259+
      });
      260+
      remaining = remaining.sub(deductAmount);
      261+
      }
      262+
      263+
      const deducted = params.cost.sub(remaining);
      264+
      const shortfall = remaining;
      265+
      266+
      // ── Apply wallet updates ──
      267+
      if (walletUpdates.length > 0) {
      268+
      this.log("settle.wallets", {
      269+
      operationId,
      270+
      walletUpdates: walletUpdates.length
      271+
      });
      272+
      await this.walletRepo.executeWalletTransactions(walletUpdates);
      273+
      }
      274+
      275+
      // ── Write ledger entries ──
      276+
      const baseLedgerMeta: LedgerMetadata = {
      277+
      feature: this.feature,
      278+
      pricingBasis: this.pricingBasis,
      279+
      pricingSnapshot: this.pricingSnapshot,
      280+
      usageDetails: {
      281+
      success: params.executionResult.success,
      282+
      executionData: params.executionResult.executionData
      283+
      },
      284+
      costMultiplier: this.costMultiplier,
      285+
      wasOverride: this.costMultiplier !== 1.0,
      286+
      requestedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(params.cost),
      287+
      deductedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(deducted),
      288+
      shortfallCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(shortfall),
      289+
      status: shortfall.gt(0) ? "settled_with_shortfall" : "settled",
      290+
      ...(shortfall.gt(0) && { settlementMode: "concurrency_shortfall" }),
      291+
      userId: params.userId,
      292+
      ...(params.context && { context: params.context })
      293+
      };
      294+
      295+
      if (walletsUsed.length > 0) {
      296+
      // One ledger entry per wallet used
      297+
      for (const used of walletsUsed) {
      298+
      await this.ledgerRepo.insertEntry({
      299+
      walletId: used.walletId,
      300+
      operationId,
      301+
      creditType: params.creditType,
      302+
      amount: used.amountDeducted.neg(),
      303+
      metadata: {
      304+
      ...baseLedgerMeta,
      305+
      // Per-wallet: override deducted with this wallet's portion
      306+
      deductedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(used.amountDeducted)
      307+
      }
      308+
      });
      309+
      }
      310+
      } else {
      311+
      // Full shortfall — no wallet funded anything
      312+
      this.log("settle.ledger", {
      313+
      operationId,
      314+
      mode: "shortfall-only"
      315+
      });
      316+
      await this.ledgerRepo.insertEntry({
      317+
      walletId: null,
      318+
      operationId,
      319+
      creditType: params.creditType,
      320+
      amount: new Decimal(0),
      321+
      metadata: baseLedgerMeta
      322+
      });
      323+
      }
      324+
      const settlementResult = {
      325+
      success: true,
      326+
      operationId,
      327+
      creditType: params.creditType,
      328+
      requestedCredits: params.cost,
      329+
      deductedCredits: deducted,
      330+
      shortfallCredits: shortfall,
      331+
      status: shortfall.gt(0) ? "settled_with_shortfall" : "settled",
      332+
      walletsUsed
      333+
      } satisfies DeductionResult;
      334+
      335+
      this.log("settle.done", {
      336+
      operationId,
      337+
      status: settlementResult.status,
      338+
      requestedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      339+
      settlementResult.requestedCredits
      340+
      ),
      341+
      deductedCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      342+
      settlementResult.deductedCredits
      343+
      ),
      344+
      shortfallCredits: this.decimalToTwoDecimals(
      345+
      settlementResult.shortfallCredits
      346+
      ),
      347+
      walletsUsed: settlementResult.walletsUsed.length
      348+
      });
      349+
      350+
      return settlementResult;
      351+
      });
      352+
      }
      353+
      }
      Collapse file

      ‎libs/backend-core-infra/src/lib/repositories/credit/transaction-manager.ts‎

      Copy file name to clipboard
      +38Lines changed: 38 additions & 0 deletions
      Comment on this fileMore options
      Original file line numberDiff line numberDiff line change
      @@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
      1+
      import type { PrismaClient } from "@vaatun/backend-core-orm";
      2+
      import {
      3+
      PrismaSymbols,
      4+
      type PrismaTransactionClient
      5+
      } from "@vaatun/backend-core-orm";
      6+
      import { inject, injectable } from "inversify";
      7+
      8+
      @injectable()
      9+
      export class TransactionManager {
      10+
      @inject(PrismaSymbols.Client)
      11+
      private prisma!: PrismaClient;
      12+
      13+
      private tx: PrismaTransactionClient | null = null;
      14+
      15+
      /**
      16+
      * Executes `fn` inside a Prisma interactive transaction.
      17+
      * While inside, all repos using getClient() will use the transaction client.
      18+
      * Safe because CreditTrackingService is created per-request — no shared state.
      19+
      */
      20+
      async executeInTransaction<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<T> {
      21+
      return this.prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
      22+
      this.tx = tx;
      23+
      try {
      24+
      return await fn();
      25+
      } finally {
      26+
      this.tx = null;
      27+
      }
      28+
      });
      29+
      }
      30+
      31+
      /**
      32+
      * Returns the transaction client if inside a transaction, otherwise the regular client.
      33+
      * Repos call this instead of using prisma directly.
      34+
      */
      35+
      getClient() {
      36+
      return this.tx ?? this.prisma;
      37+
      }
      38+
      }
      Collapse file

      import type { ITenantRepository } from "@vaatun/vantage-entities/tenant/repository.ts";

      117+

      121+

      122+

      123+

      124+
      })
      125+
      })

      ),

      128+
      .record(z.string(), z.object({ costMultiplier: z.number().positive() }))
      129+
      .default({})
      130+
      })
      131+
      .optional()
      132+
      .transform((credits) => credits ?? createDefaultTenantCreditConfig()),
      110133
      status: z.enum(["Active", "Inactive"]).default("Active")
      111134
      });
